replies.msg: 我都係用返當日支持阻旅客入閘d人既思維

最近突然爆左好多所謂“支持”香港人嘅塗鴉喺澳洲各大比較標緻性嘅地點出現，本地tg 已經留意出並籲大家唔好咁做。
喺澳洲香港人都好自發性將支持嘅標語貼喺連儂牆， 從來都冇香港人會用塗鴉嘅方法，所以極度懷疑有人有組織性地想抹黑香港人。
我呼籲澳洲巴絲如果見到類似嘅塗鴉， 影低相同埋記錄時間地點，可能需要交畀警察處理。
清咗，但係，未清乾淨晒

replies.msg: https://www.facebook.com/1764116977186092/posts/2345789849018799/?sfnsn=mo

澳港聯於最近，收到有居住澳洲的香港人通報，在一Facebook群組發現不同旅遊景點受到塗鴉破壞的照片。

我們謹對這種蓄意破壞歷史文物的行為深表遺憾，並對這種行為作出嚴厲讉責。經過與幾名群組內的在澳香港人商討，發出以下幾點聲明：

1 不點名批評是次畜意破壞文物的行為，任何在澳洲居住人士如有任何政治或法律訴求，都應該遵從澳洲法律發表訴求，而並非以惡意破壞手段發表意見；
2 有香港人已向警方通知，希望警方或有關部門能對事件作出深入調查，並早日拘捕有關涉案人士。而警方表示會在維州各景點留意任何類似違法行為
3 有香港人已經積極聯絡有關部門並自發提供協助；
4 重申在澳香港人一直以和平及合法手段去提出訴求，並不鼓勵任何人士作出違法行為；
5 重申在澳香港人一直致力愛護及擁護澳洲文化及價值；

我們必須指出，過去一個月澳洲華人圈已經發生不少衝突事件。本會及群組內人士皆希望各方能以和平及合法的手段去表達訴求，並停止一切過激或暴力行為。

Recently, Australia-Hong Kong Link received reports from Australian Hong Kongers that photos of various vandalised tourist destinations were posted onto Facebook groups.

We find it extremely regrettable that these deliberate acts of vandalism of public property have been committed, and strongly condemn such behaviours. After discussions with several Australian Hong Kongers in these Facebook groups, we would like to issue the following statement.

Firstly, we strongly and unequivocally denounce such acts of public vandalisation. Any Australian residents with any political or legal statements should offer such statements in a legal manner, and not resort to malicious acts of vandalisation.

Secondly, we have notified the police, and we hope that the police can investigate these crimes, and bring the suspects to justice. Victoria Police has stated that they will closely monitor such illegal acts at various tourist destinations in the state.

Thirdly, several Hong Kongers has been in close contact with the relevant government bodies, and have offered their help unreservedly.

Fourthly, we would like to reiterate that Australian Hong Kongers has thus far expressed our opinions and concerns in a peaceful and legal manner, and we do not encourage illegal acts of any sort.

Finally, we would also like to reiterate that Australian Hong Kongers are firm in our belief of Australian values, and that we have always strongly cherished and upheld Australian culture.

We must note that in the past month, there has been various clashes within the Chinese-Australian community. Australia-Hong Kong Link and all Australian Hong Kongers sincerely wish that all parties can express their opinions peacefully and legally, and that any kind of violence and provocative acts will cease in the future.
似係鬼佬支持我地噴嘅
